narrative:
Morrow County has 23,974 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.6% of registrants.
